use_codes.desc: METHOD OF USE OF ADMINISTERING LEVOTHYROXINE

indications.text:
Hypothyroidism
LEVOXYL is indicated in pediatric and adult patients as a replacement therapy in primary (thyroidal), secondary (pituitary), and
tertiary (hypothalamic) congenital or acquired hypothyroidism.
Pituitary Thyrotropin (Thyroid-Stimulating Hormone, TSH) Suppression
